---
title: "Teaching"
page-layout: full
description: "Teaching and supervision by Mesfin Genie."
---

::: {.page-header}
::: {.page-shell}
# Teaching

Health economics, behavioural economics and applied research supervision.
:::
:::

::: {.prose}
## Current courses

::: {.course-grid}
::: {.course-card}
<div class="course-code">ECON2112</div>

### Health Economics and Finance

Healthcare markets, insurance, provider behaviour, economic evaluation and health-policy design.
:::

::: {.course-card}
<div class="course-code">ECON3111</div>

### Behavioural Economics

Decision-making under risk and uncertainty, intertemporal choice, social preferences, experiments and behavioural public policy.
:::
:::

## Additional teaching

**ECON3011 · Health Economics and Finance**  
Course coordination and teaching in applied health economics, economic evaluation and health-system decision-making.

## Research supervision

Current supervision includes doctoral research on telehealth use and costs, climate change and agriculture, and the economic evaluation of crop drought-resilience strategies. Previous supervision includes research on health-system reform and the socioeconomic consequences of vaccine mandates.
:::
